name: aether
description: Personal style memory, prompt refinement, and image generation workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Capture visual styles, refine prompts, and record image generations.
interface.longDescription: Aether turns reference images and source prompts into reusable style cards, refines fuzzy image prompts with Codex, and records generation runs through configurable Codex image skills.
defaultPrompt: 沉淀这组参考图的共同风格
用已有风格帮我精修这段生图提示词
基于精修提示词生成图片并记录结果
